name: Story - Family Resolution
description: Parallel family-story resolutions for character generation. Results are filtered by thread key in code.

results.description: [money 1d6*100] The inheritance was settled by an ugly division that let each side leave offended and still take something home.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: [money 1d3*100] The inheritance question ended not with clarity but exhaustion, as the family took what could be secured and ceased speaking of the rest.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: [money 2d6*100] The family kept a narrowed share of the inheritance, enough to matter but not enough to satisfy anyone who remembered the original promise.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: [money 1d6*100][social -1] The inheritance was never proved cleanly, only worn down into a compromise that future generations would call final out of fatigue.
results.name: disputed-inheritance

results.description: The feud lost its heat after one side overreached, leaving resentment behind but no longer giving daily shape to household life.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: [contact] A marriage tie, negotiated peace, or simple mutual inconvenience dulled the feud into habit rather than open hostility.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: [social 1] The quarrel survived in tone rather than deed, which was peace enough for everyone who still needed to trade and worship nearby.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: The feud survived only in retellings by the elders, who spoke of it more fondly than anyone else had suffered it.
results.name: old-feud

results.description: [contact] Your household discharged the old obligation in full, and the relief proved almost as unsettling as the debt had been.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: The patron's hold slackened when power changed hands, leaving your family grateful for the break and suspicious of the price.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: [contact] The old obligation was discharged with gifts, service, and careful words, none of which made the dependence feel noble in hindsight.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: Distance, misfortune, and altered loyalties wore the patron's claim down until it became a matter of history instead of instruction.
results.name: patron-obligation

results.description: [bio RollTable.ogCUBgf4giALU7XZ] The household scandal was contained again, not by innocence, but by time, caution, and the appearance of better subjects to discuss.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: [social 1] In the end the scandal remained known in outline and forgotten in detail, which is often the nearest thing families get to victory.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: The shame lost its hold not because it was disproved, but because too few now cared enough to preserve the sharper version.
results.name: buried-scandal

results.description: What remained of the scandal was reduced to a family flinch and a warning tone, no longer ruinous but never wholly dead.
results.name: buried-scandal
